description: SCMProviderGeneratorFilter is a single repository filter. If multiple filter types are set on a single struct, they will be AND'd together. All filters must pass for a repo to be included.

branchMatch.description: A regex which must match the branch name.

labelMatch.description: A regex which must match at least one label.

pathsDoNotExist.description: An array of paths, all of which must not exist.

pathsExist.description: An array of paths, all of which must exist.
